titleStmt.title: SII 42.249: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 249. (A.R. No. 11 of 1956-57.) Narsāpur, Narsapur Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up outside the Madanagōpālasvāmin temple.
This is dated in the king's regnal year 35 in Śaka 1097, Chaitra, Vishuva-sankrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1175, March 25.

Records a gift of 25 buffaloes for half a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mārkaṇḍīśvaramahādēva by Komari-raḍḍi for the merit of his father Dōrama-raḍḍi. The buffaloes were entrusted to Eṟiyama-bōya, son of Aṁga Kāpana, stipulating the quantity of ghee to be supplied for the lamp at an aḍḍa every day by the sāniya-māna. The inscription was written by Naṁganasari (Nanganāchāri ?), who probably incised the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1097 [Agu]
nēṇḍu svasti sa¨rvvalōkāśraya śrīviṣṇuva
¨rddhana mahārājula prava¨rddhamāna vija
yarājya saṁvatsaraṁbulu 35 nēṁṭi caitra viṣuvu
saṁkrāṁttināṇḍu dōramaraḍḍi koḍuku koma
riraḍḍi tamataṁḍriki śrīmā¨rkkaṇḍēśva
ramahādēvaraku Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu naḍa
vagāṁbeṭṭina Akhaṇḍa Aradīpamunaku

ga kāpanakoḍuku Eṟiyamabō
yini vasamunaṁ beṭṭina yinupa
yeḍlu 25 vīniṁjēkoni nitya sā
niyamānika A¨rdhamāneṇḍu nē
yi vōyaṁggalavāṁḍu . naṁganasari li
ki(khi)tamu [.]
Digital edition of SII 42.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
